hypothesis: If a ReAct-based GPT-4o LLM agent with DSPy few-shot prompt tuning is coupled to the Nb–O simulator, then it will achieve equal or higher success rates and visit fewer states (i.e., be more computationally efficient) on the four three-step synthesis challenges than a discretized A* search, because the LLM can leverage learned heuristics and tool use to guide more targeted action sequences.
